t_en: There were no appointments listed on the terminal today, so I left for a short break. I wasn't expecting anyone to actually show up.

t_ch: 等我看看报告…唔，你不是空间站的啊？那权限是…喔，站长加的。这个结果嘛，有几个指标异常……
t_en: Let me see... Well, you're not from the space station, are you? So you were approved by... Oh, lead researcher. These results show several abnormalities...

t_ch: 你得救救我呀医生。
t_en: You have to save me, doctor.

t_ch: 别慌，听我慢慢跟你讲解。
t_en: Don't panic, I'll explain it all to you slowly.

t_ch: 你就直说吧，我顶得住。
t_en: Just give it to me straight, doc. I can take it.

t_ch: 呃，那我就直说了。
t_en: Okay, I'll cut to the chase.

t_ch: 你是不是最近常常感觉浑身乏力，做什么都没精神？可能还伴有间接性头晕、耳鸣等症状？
t_en: Have you been feeling drained and lacking motivation to do anything lately? Maybe with some intermittent symptoms like dizziness or tinnitus?

t_ch: 好像是有点。
t_en: Seems like it, at least a little bit.

t_ch: 有就对了。
t_en: As I expected.

t_ch: 没哦，我感觉好得很。
t_en: No, I feel fine.

t_ch: 这种轻状的确不易察觉。
t_en: Light symptoms such as these can easily go undetected.

t_ch: 其实也没什么大碍，说白了就是缺乏足够的睡眠。这一点你得像我学习，要多休息，少熬夜。
t_en: In any case, the situation isn't that grave. To put it bluntly, you're sleep-deprived. You should be more like me, get plenty of rest and don't stay up too late.

t_ch: 对了，最近空间站里有怪物出没，你平时也要多加小心。我这里有些常备药品，你带在身上，要是不小心受伤了注意及时清创。
t_en: By the way, recently there have been monsters lurking about the space station, so be careful out there. Here're some first aid supplies in case you ever need it. Remember to always clean wounds promptly and thoroughly!

t_ch: 记得要遵医嘱哦。
t_en: Don't forget to follow your doctor's orders~

t_ch: 尊敬的{NICKNAME}，空间站本年度员工体检已完成，请勿重复提交体检申请。
t_en: Dear {NICKNAME}, your annual staff medical examination has been completed. There is no need to resubmit medical examination applications.

t_ch: 破碎的奇物，裂痕周遭有粒子漂浮，折射出不稳定的光，这让你联想到了某种古早的显像管设备，还有一条不知为何流传甚广的神秘规则：「拍一拍就好了」。
t_en: A shattered Curio, with particles floating around the crack refracting unstable light. It reminds you of some kind of ancient cathode-ray tube device, and a mysterious rule that everyone somehow knows — if it's not working, try hitting it.

t_ch: 你下意识伸出手拍了拍它，不知是否错觉，你感觉奇物发出的光比先前耀眼。
t_en: You subconsciously reach out to tap the Curio. Not knowing whether it is an illusion, you feel that the light emitted by the strange object is more dazzling than before.

t_ch: 你决定——
t_en: You decide to...

t_ch: 拍一拍。
t_en: ...tap it a few times.

t_ch: 似乎没什么反应，你决定——
t_en: Nothing seems to happen. You decide to...

t_ch: 再拍一拍。
t_en: ...tap it again.

t_ch: 似乎并没有什么变化。
t_en: Doesn't seem like anything is different.

t_ch: 算了，不拍了。
t_en: Forget it. You give up.

t_ch: 你计算了下损坏奇物的赔偿金，你认为那将是天文数字，于是你悻悻地收回了手。
t_en: You calculate the compensation that would be owed for damaging a Curio, which is an astronomical sum. You resentfully withdraw your hand.

t_ch: 好像还是没什么反应，你决定——
t_en: Still doesn't seem like anything happened, so you decide to...

t_ch: 再拍一拍。
t_en: ...tap it again.

t_ch: 黯淡的奇物突然大放光芒，你连忙捂住了眼睛。数息后，你重新睁开眼，裂痕却消失殆尽……
t_en: The previously dim Curio suddenly shines brightly, and you throw your hands up to shield your eyes. Several seconds later, you open your eyes — but the cracks have disappeared...

t_ch: 在确认过自己并非出现幻觉后，你决定将此事告知艾丝妲。
t_en: After checking that you're not hallucinating, you decide to tell Asta about this.

t_ch: 不拍了。
t_en: Don't tap it.

t_ch: 你仔细地思考了下那条神秘规则，你认为这毫无道理，你决定就此停手。
t_en: You think carefully about the mysterious rule, decide it doesn't make any sense, and stop hitting it.

t_ch: 还是别拍了。
t_en: Don't tap it.

t_ch: 也是，万一把奇物拍烂了，传出去影响多不好。
t_en: After all, if you hit it the wrong way, it could lead to unfortunate consequences.

t_ch: 柜子里空空如也，原本存放于此的光锥早已不见踪影。
t_en: The cabinet is absolutely bare, with the Light Cone once stored there now long gone.

t_ch: 你记得在危难时刻，阿兰让你带上它…如今空间站危机已经解除，也该物归原主了。
t_en: You remember Arlan asking you to take it during that crisis... and now that everything's over, it's time to return it to the original owner.

t_ch: （将光锥放回柜子里）
t_en: (Return the light cone to the cabinet)

t_ch: 借来的东西，终究是要还的，何况是一枚平平无奇的光锥。
t_en: What is borrowed must eventually be returned, even if it is just an average Light Cone.

t_ch: （闭目沉默告别）
t_en: (Silent bid farewell with eyes closed)

t_ch: 未来的路有同伴相随，对你来说，一枚光锥能算什么。
t_en: Your path ahead will be full of companions. What's one measly Light Cone worth to you?

s_en: Researcher who refers to himself as "this old one"
t_ch: 哎哟哎哟，小年轻哟，你刚才是不是把一张光锥放回了收容柜呀？
t_en: My oh my, young {F#lady}{M#man}, did you just put a Light Cone back into the cabinet?

s_en: Researcher who refers to himself as "this old one"
t_ch: 老朽上了岁数眼神就不好使了，你说说，你放进去的光锥到底是什么样的呀？
t_en: Your eyesight really does get terrible with old age. Tell this old one, please — what kind of Light Cone did you put in?

t_ch: 「八心八箭的光锥」
t_en: Jeweled-Studded Arrowheart Light Cone

s_en: Researcher who refers to himself as "this old one"
t_ch: 嗯？你说什么？老朽有点听不清！
t_en: ...What was that? This old one can't hear you!

t_ch: 「外露王霸之气的光锥」
t_en: Domineering King's Aura Light Cone

s_en: Researcher who refers to himself as "this old one"
t_ch: 啊？你说什么？哎哟，到底是哪个嘛！
t_en: Huh? What's that? *Sigh* which one is it then?

t_ch: 我坦白…都不是。
t_en: To be honest... none of them.

s_en: Researcher who refers to himself as "this old one"
t_ch: 不错，不错！不愧是老朽看中的小年轻。诚实就是你最可贵的地方，老朽要好好奖励奖励你……
t_en: Not bad, not bad! This old one knew you had it in you. Honesty and candor are your best virtues, and naturally, a reward is in order...

s_en: Researcher who refers to himself as "this old one"
t_ch: 不过…「八心八箭镶嵌珠宝的光锥」俗不可耐，配不上你出众的气质。
t_en: But this Jeweled-Studded Arrowheart Light Cone is too mundane an object for such a high-quality individual as yourself.

s_en: Researcher who refers to himself as "this old one"
t_ch: 而「通体外露王霸之气的光锥」狂妄至极，配不上你一身的好本领。
t_en: And this Domineering King's Aura Light Cone is tacky and pretentious, and naturally unworthy of someone with your great talent.

s_en: Researcher who refers to himself as "this old one"
t_ch: 依老朽看，你这一副依依不舍的样子，不如把你的光锥还给你吧！哈哈，也算成全你了！
t_en: Despite my old age, I can still tell you look reluctant, so why don't I return the original Light Cone to you? That's what you want, isn't it?

t_ch: 柜子里依然没有光锥的踪影，你不禁想起了那个自称「老朽」的科员，你好奇他的兜里到底揣了多少光锥……
t_en: There's no trace of a Light Cone in the cabinet. You can't help but recall that researcher calling himself "this old one" and wonder how many Light Cones he must have been carrying in his pocket...

s_en: Researcher who refers to himself as "this old one"
t_ch: 是「八心八箭镶嵌珠宝的光锥」呢，还是「通体外露王霸之气的光锥」哇？
t_en: Was it the Jeweled-Studded Arrowheart Light Cone? Or was it the Domineering King's Aura Light Cone?

t_ch: 空间站里人来人往，科员们却对宝箱的存在视若无睹。难道大家看不到这个宝箱？你不禁思索，一种原始的本能与冲动涌上心头……
t_en: People come and go in the space station, but the researchers are oblivious to the presence of the chest. Could it be that no one else can see it? You can't help but ponder, and a primal impulse begins to course throughout you...

t_ch: 你正准备打开宝箱，耳畔却突然响起一句呵斥——
t_en: You are about to open the chest when suddenly a reprimand rings in your ears —

s_en: Researcher of the Department of Implement Arts
t_ch: 你这人怎么乱翻别人东西啊？
t_en: Why are you rummaging through other people's things?

t_ch: 你悻悻地收回手，目送着那位科员抱起宝箱就此离去。
t_en: You resentfully withdraw your hand and watch the researcher pick up the treasure chest and leave.

t_ch: 再次见到这个宝箱，炽热浓烈的本能在你胸腔间不断升腾，但你知道这是有主之物，在道德的痛苦与压抑下，想要开启宝箱的欲念无奈地喑哑。
t_en: That fiery, strong instinct rises up in you once more as you see this chest again, but you know the chest already has an owner. The desire to open it is helplessly strangled in the midst of moral pain and repression.

t_ch: 你的双手早已抢先大脑一步，在接触宝箱冰冷表面的瞬间，你艰难地将手收回，为何宝箱不属于你？为何习以为常的行为竟成了一种罪孽？宇宙中究竟有多少东西是你能掌控的呢……
t_en: Your hands react faster than your brain, and the moment you touch the cold surface of the chest, you pull back with difficulty. Why is this chest not yours? Why is this habitual behavior now a sin? How much of the universe is actually within your control...?

t_ch: 你正准备离开伤心地，却发现旁边有位科员在看着你。你强忍住泪水，向他礼貌性地点点头，在转过身时，他却叫住了你。
t_en: You are about to leave this sad place, but then you notice a researcher watching you from the side. You hold back your tears and nod politely to him, but as you turn around, he calls out to you.

s_en: Researcher of the Department of Implement Arts
t_ch: 等一下！那个，刚刚你是在哭吗？
t_en: Hang on! Were you crying just now?

t_ch: 抱歉，我真的忍不住。
t_en: Sorry, I really couldn't help myself.

s_en: Researcher of the Department of Implement Arts
t_en: Hmm...

t_ch: 是你看错了。
t_en: It seems I was mistaken.

s_en: Researcher of the Department of Implement Arts
t_ch: 不用骗我了。
t_en: There's no need for pity.

s_en: Researcher of the Department of Implement Arts
t_ch: {F#姐妹}{M#哥们}，其实那种感觉，我懂。看到上锁的箱子，就想去开，打不开就觉得浑身有蚂蚁在爬，非常难受，对吧？
t_en: As a matter of fact, I understand that feeling.

s_en: Researcher of the Department of Implement Arts
t_ch: 其实在你第一次想开我箱子的时候，我就注意到你了。最开始我还以为你是小偷……
t_en: Actually, I noticed you the first time you tried to open my chest. At first, I thought you were a thief...

s_en: Researcher of the Department of Implement Arts
t_ch: 但就在刚才…我真的没想到，竟然能遇到同好！我理解你，真的！我跟你一样，看到箱子就非得上去开一下。
t_en: But just now... I never thought that I could find someone with the same hobby as me! I'm the same way — when I see a chest, I have to go over and open it.

s_en: Researcher of the Department of Implement Arts
t_ch: 既然是同好，那就给你开一下箱子解解馋吧…不过这里面是我的私人衣物，这可不能给你。
t_en: Seeing as you're a fellow hunter of treasure chests, I'll sate your cravings... But these are just my personal clothes, so I can't give them to you.

s_en: Researcher of the Department of Implement Arts
t_ch: 这样吧，我送你点私人珍藏，以后有缘再见吧。
t_en: I'll tell you what, I happen to have with me something I've collected. Just take it. Perhaps we'll cross paths again sometime.

t_ch: 您好，订餐机器人「炒饭天才<unbreak>123</unbreak>号」为您服务。
t_en: Hello, Food Order Robot Cooking Genius No. <unbreak>123</unbreak> at your service!

t_ch: 正在识别用户身份信息，请不要晃动您的工牌或人脸。识别成功，您当前可领取的套餐为：「空间站商务套餐」。
t_en: Scanning user identification information, please do not move your Name Card or face. Scan successful. The meal package available for pickup is: "Space Station Business Meal."

t_ch: 当前排队领取人数为：0，餐点正在为您派送中，请您耐心等候。
t_en: Current number in line: 0. The meal is being dispatched for you, please wait patiently.

t_ch: 派送中…派送中…派送成功，「空间站商务套餐」已发放，祝您用餐愉快。
t_en: Delivery in progress... Delivery in progress... Delivery successful. "Space Station Business Meal" has been delivered. Enjoy your meal.

t_ch: 您好，您的套餐已发放，请勿重复领取。
t_en: Hello, your meal has been delivered. Please do not attempt a repeat pick-up.

t_ch: 温馨提示：空间站内的套餐均有专人定量搭配，保证每个人吃得开心吃得放心。套餐虽好，请勿过量食用哦。
t_en: Friendly reminder: Meal packages in the space station are designed by specialists to ensure that everyone can enjoy their meal with peace of mind. Although the meal packages are high quality, please do not over-eat.

t_ch: 您好，订餐机器人「炒饭天才<unbreak>123</unbreak>号」竭诚为您服务。
t_en: Hello, Food Order Robot Cooking Genius No. <unbreak>123</unbreak> at your service!

t_ch: 正在识别用户身份信息，请不要晃动您的工牌或人脸。识别成功，欢迎您，尊敬的{NICKNAME}科员。
t_en: Scanning user identification information, please do not move your Name Card or face. Scan successful. Welcome, researcher {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 检测到您的空间站权限有提升，当前计划内的套餐升级为「空间站高级科员专享至臻套餐」。
t_en: An upgrade has been detected with your space station permissions. The current package has been upgraded to the "Senior Researcher Exclusive — Supreme Meal Package."

t_ch: 餐点正在为您派送中，请您耐心等候。派送中…派送中…派送成功，「空间站高级科员专享至臻套餐」已发放，祝您用餐愉快。
t_en: Delivery in progress. Please be patient while the meal is being delivered to you. Delivery successful. The "Senior Researcher Exclusive — Supreme Meal Package" has been delivered. Enjoy your meal.

t_ch: 温馨提示：想品尝更多美味，请提升自己的科员级别。
t_en: Tip: If you want to taste more delicious food, please upgrade your Researcher level.

t_ch: 一枚千纸鹤，表面有着淡淡清香，你小心地将它拆开，字迹浮现于眼前——
t_en: An origami crane, lightly-scented. You gently take it apart, and some words unfold before you...
